---
title: "\'Christian\'s Name\'"
---

## \'Christian\'s Name\'

**Author:** Harriette? Cheape
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July-September 1890)

### Notes

This work appeared under the name \'Joanna Harrison\' but CMY ascribes it to a [[person:289]Miss Cheape], of St. Andrews, probably Harriette Cheape.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
